title: Kanye West ordered to pay $140K in Malibu mansion renovation lawsuit
summary_full: A handyman had sought $1.7m (£1.267m) from the rapper over claims of unpaid work, medical expenses and being unfairly fired.
summary_public: A handyman had sought $1.7m (£1.267m) from the rapper over claims of unpaid work, medical expenses and being unfairly fired.
